     The Numbers Business Report

Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $67,587,546Details
International Box Office $106,900,000
Worldwide Box Office $174,487,546
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,951,085
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,185,329
Total $7,136,414
Further financial details...

Synopsis

As the world fell, young Furiosa is snatched from the Green Place of Many Mothers and falls into the hands of a great Biker Horde led by the Warlord Dementus. Sweeping through the Wasteland, they come across the Citadel presided over by The Immortan Joe. While the two Tyrants war for dominance, Furiosa must survive many trials as she puts together the means to find her way home.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$26,326,462 (39.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.57 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:38.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$168,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,804 opening theaters/3,864 max. theaters, 3.7 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $71,471,884

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 24th, 2024 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
May 24th, 2024 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: May 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Furiosa: Une Saga de Mad Max (France)
May 22nd, 2024 (Wide) (Thailand)
May 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Furiosa (Belgium)
May 22nd, 2024 (Wide), released as Furiosa: A Mad Max Saga (퓨리오사-매드맥스 사가) (South Korea)
May 23rd, 2024 (Wide), released as Furiosa (Australia)
Video Release: June 25th, 2024 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for sequences of strong violence, and grisly images.
(Rating bulletin 2831 (cert #54912), 4/24/2024)
Running Time: 148 minutes
Franchise: Mad Max
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Prequel, Sequel With Lead Character Recast, Sequels Without Their Original Stars
Film festival: Cannes Film Festival 2024
Filming location (country): Australia
Social setting: Post Apocalypse
Subgenre: Action Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Village Roadshow Productions, Warner Bros., Kennedy Miller Mitchell Productions
Production Countries: Australia, United States
Languages: English

While the two Tyrants war for dominance, Furiosa must survive many trials as she puts together the means to find her way home.
